semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all nine assigned source notes and passage-mapping limits, the eight-record deterministic custody lifecycle fixture, all nine Lean declarations under eight manifest targets, all nine rejecting mutations, every manifest atom, all prose scanner candidates, the worked custody trace, flow diagram, test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep replaced file-centric custody with a threat-model-bound model-family and derivative-closure contract; separated Attester Evidence, Verifier appraisal, Attestation Result, Relying-Party authorization, key release, observed load/use effects, runtime authority, and distribution authority; added exact key lifecycle, plaintext and output-extraction exposure, role-dependency, backup/recovery, incident/revocation, effort-relative sanitization, privacy/rights, availability, cost, and irreversible-release semantics; installed strong comparators, effect-bearing workload requirements, joint metrics, causal ablations, independent replication, transfer, and explicit promotion/refutation gates; and preserved zero chapter-core support effect.

scope.population: Model-family assets and reconstructable derivatives across creation, acquisition, encryption, storage, copying, transformation, packaging, transfer, decryption, load, serving, backup, recovery, revocation, sanitization, disclosure, recipient distribution, and retirement events.
scope.environment: Current public source notes, deterministic Boolean custody records, finite Lean routes, and a future preregistered public-safe effect-bearing campaign spanning mock and authorized hardware-backed local, cloud, and edge environments; production custody is outside current evidence.
scope.model: A versioned threat-model, asset-and-derivative-closure, key-lifecycle, RATS-separated appraisal, effect-observation, authority-separation, recovery, sanitization, and irreversible-release transaction whose current implementation validates only eight finite records and nine theorem declarations.
scope.authority: Human/governance owners freeze threat model, closure, security and availability properties, rights, release policy, and residual acceptance; separate-enough asset, key, Attester, Verifier, Relying-Party, observer, incident, recovery, sanitization, privacy/rights, and Evidence State owners govern their exact surfaces.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; threat model, asset closure, identities, keys, appraisal and relying-party policies, reference values, endorsements, trust anchors, dependency graph, freshness, operation, recipient, observers, outcome window, metrics, and comparators must be frozen prospectively and versioned after material change.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; nine reviewed source mappings; eight deterministic custody records; nine Lean declarations under eight targets; nine rejecting mutations; future discovery, key, appraisal, load/effect, extraction, incident, recovery, sanitization, comparison, ablation, replication, and transfer artifacts.

assumptions: A useful but explicitly incomplete threat model and model-family derivative closure can be frozen without implying discovery completeness.
Independent-enough implementations can distinguish requested key, appraisal, load, serve, copy, extraction, revocation, recovery, and sanitization transitions from their observed effects.
Strong IAM, registry/provenance, KMS, vendor confidential-compute, and RATS-separated baselines can be implemented under matched artifacts, adversaries, workloads, and budgets.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Mature model registries, signed provenance, IAM, KMS/HSM controls, confidential-computing platforms, RATS-style attestation, backup and incident processes, and media-sanitization programs already cover the useful boundary; open-world derivative closure and recall are impossible, authorized use can leak effective capability, hardware and verifier dependencies remain vulnerable, and the proposed transaction adds correlated governance cost and availability risk.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: A reachable admitted custody transition violates any frozen closure, identity, lineage, key, appraisal, freshness, dependency, observation, authority, plaintext/extraction, copy, recovery, revocation, sanitization, privacy/rights, cost, or residual rule; a required field has no exercised producer, consumer, owner, or consequence; or a strong simpler baseline dominates the preregistered joint frontier.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze the strongest model-weight security, provenance, key-management, confidential-computing, attestation, extraction, incident, recovery, and sanitization comparators without novelty or conformance laundering.
Justify protected assets, holders, purposes, rights, privacy, recovery, release benefits, recipient obligations, irreversible residual acceptance, incident action, and compensation.
Specify finite identity, lineage, appraisal, freshness, authority, lifecycle, revocation, closure, and non-promotion consequences while exposing abstraction and open-world limits.
Exercise actual discovery, key, appraisal, relying-party, decrypt/load/use, copy, extraction, incident, recovery, sanitization, distribution, and rejecting-mutation effects.

Measure unauthorized acquisition/use, plaintext exposure, extraction, stale/false appraisal, false denial, copy discovery, revocation, sanitization, availability, recovery, benefit, latency, labor, privacy/rights, and total cost jointly.

Ablate derivative closure, role separation, relational freshness, effect observation, authority separation, recovery reconciliation, sanitization validation, and irreversibility accounting under matched work.

Repeat across model families, artifact classes, key and attestation stacks, hardware/vendors, environments, operators, adversaries, incidents, release modes, and time with independent implementations.

contrary_evidence: Mature model security, registry, provenance, IAM, key-management, confidential-computing, attestation, incident-response, and sanitization systems already cover substantial proposed mechanisms.
No finite inventory can guarantee discovery or recall of all caches, memory, backups, recipients, extracted equivalents, or unknown derivatives.
Attestation depends on roots, firmware, endorsements, reference values, policies, Verifier code, vendors, operators, and Relying-Party interpretation; a valid result is not universal trust.

Authorized workloads, outputs, adapters, distillation, queries, insiders, recovery paths, and recipients can expose or reconstruct effective capability despite encrypted storage or confidential loading.
Revocation and sanitization cannot recall plaintext, recipient-controlled artifacts, descendants, or public disclosures outside the controller's boundary.

The current evidence consists only of eight deterministic Boolean records, nine finite theorem declarations, and nine rejecting mutations with no real artifact, key, hardware, effect, adversary, recovery, or sanitization result.
known_confounds: Threat models, derivative-closure rules, attacker effort, sanitization targets, freshness, observers, release properties, and residuals can be narrowed after failures are seen.
Nominally separate roles can share hardware roots, vendor infrastructure, policy code, operators, organizations, data, metrics, and incentives.
A denied key or failed workload can reduce exposure while also destroying usefulness, availability, recovery, or incident response.
Synthetic artifacts and mock attestations can omit accelerator, firmware, side-channel, cloud-replica, recipient, human, vendor, and physical paths.
Absence of observed leakage can reflect weak discovery or extraction rather than effective custody.
Security, recovery, privacy/rights, human labor, recipient obligations, compensation, and irreversible costs can be omitted or shifted to another layer.
acceptance_criteria: Every frozen threat, asset, derivative, identity, holder, location, key, appraisal, dependency, observer, authority, copy, incident, recovery, sanitization, privacy/rights, cost, and residual field has an exact producer, consumer, owner, valid case, rejecting mutation, and observed non-default consequence.

A preregistered effect-bearing campaign meets every joint security, usefulness, availability, recovery, privacy/rights, cost, causal-ablation, independent-replication, and transfer gate against all frozen strong comparators.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact assets, derivative-closure rule, holders, adversary, property, effort, artifact, key, hardware, target/attesting environment, policy, reference values, endorsements, dependencies, recipient, operation, observer, epoch, outcome window, costs, and residuals.

Separate schema validity, provenance, appraisal, Relying-Party decision, key action, decryption, observed load/use, extraction, runtime authority, distribution authority, revocation, recovery, sanitization, support movement, and production outcome.

Unknown or failed discovery, identity, key, appraisal, observation, authority, copy, recovery, sanitization, privacy/rights, cost, or closure remains blocked, repaired, reviewed, quarantined, residual, narrowed, or refuted.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable admitted trace violates it or a required field lacks an exercised producer, consumer, owner, or consequence.
Refute a mechanism benefit when its matched ablation preserves every frozen joint outcome or the full mechanism worsens the joint frontier.

Refute custody-complete, confidentiality, hardware-trust, superiority, recall, sanitization, or transfer wording when discovery misses a declared branch, extraction succeeds beyond the property, a simpler comparator dominates, or independent replication/transfer fails.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise supply-chain, artifact-graph, key, attestation, runtime-security, readiness, incident, privacy/rights, or evidence owner supersedes the atom and all consumers migrate with lineage.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and run the public-safe effect-bearing campaign with strong IAM/registry/KMS/vendor/RATS baselines, independent discovery/appraisal/relying-party/load/extraction/incident/recovery/sanitization implementations, exact joint gates, causal ablations, replication, and transfer after prerequisite runtime bindings exist.

non_claims: Semantic review, source mapping, encryption, a signature, a security level, an attestation result, a key decision, a valid record, a finite theorem, or zero observed theft does not establish custody completeness, confidentiality, trustworthy hardware, extraction resistance, sanitization, recall, or safe release.
The current eight custody records, nine theorem declarations under eight targets, and nine mutations establish only their exact finite record and route semantics.
No support state, deployment permission, release authority, conformance, novelty, AGI, or ASI claim changes without its separate owner and accepted evidence transition.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: Existing registry, IAM, KMS, confidential-computing, attestation, incident, and sanitization systems already provide the useful boundary; the proposed closure is incomplete, correlated, costly, availability-reducing, and unable to reverse disclosure or authorized extraction.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: Any admitted transition violates a frozen closure, identity, key, appraisal, observation, authority, copy, recovery, sanitization, privacy/rights, cost, or residual obligation, or any strong simpler comparator dominates the joint frontier.
acceptance_criteria: Meet every frozen effect-bearing security, usefulness, availability, recovery, privacy/rights, cost, causal-ablation, independent-replication, and transfer gate against all strong comparators.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: Representative deployed model platforms already maintain effect-complete custody across every material model-family derivative and transition.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: A dated representative audit finds no material derivative, key, appraisal, plaintext, authority, recovery, sanitization, recipient, privacy, availability, or residual gap.
acceptance_criteria: Complete a dated comparator audit that preserves the strongest existing systems and states only the exact remaining problem boundary.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: A properly composed registry, signed provenance, IAM, KMS, confidential-compute, RATS, incident, backup, and sanitization stack supplies every named property at lower cost.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: A frozen conventional composition exercises every named property at equal or lower joint security error, utility, privacy, availability, recovery, and cost.
acceptance_criteria: Reproduce or audit strong current comparators before claiming a distinct missing boundary or mechanism advantage.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: The minimum is self-authored Boolean record and theorem theater with no key, attestation, load, extraction, recovery, or sanitization effect.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: Any of the exact eight routes, nine theorem declarations, nine mutation rejections, fixture digest, or non-claim boundaries fails clean recomputation or prose generalizes beyond them.
acceptance_criteria: Cleanly reproduce the eight expected routes, nine theorem declarations under eight targets, nine rejecting mutations, exact fixture digest, and support_state_effect=none.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: The full custody transaction is dominated by mature simpler controls because open-world closure and recall are impossible and its overhead increases false denial, outages, recovery failure, and governance cost without reducing real leakage or extraction.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: The full condition misses any frozen joint gate, a mechanism lacks its predicted causal signature, independent replication or transfer fails, or a strong simpler baseline dominates.
acceptance_criteria: Complete the preregistered multi-comparator effect-bearing causal, independently replicated, transfer campaign and meet every frozen joint gate.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: The theorem restates a Boolean invalid-attestation premise and does not verify real Evidence, appraisal, key denial, or load effects.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: The model admits bounded load under its stated invalid-attestation condition or cannot refine to the executable route without changing meaning.
acceptance_criteria: Audit proof necessity and bind the predicate to independently generated Evidence, appraisal, key decision, and observed load effects with rejecting mutations.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: The theorem maps trusted Boolean completeness fields to a label and neither discovers derivatives nor observes any real decrypt, plaintext, load, serve, or extraction effect.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: A modeled incomplete record reaches bounded load or the route cannot represent an effect-bearing load without semantic distortion.
acceptance_criteria: Add executable key, appraisal, load, plaintext, extraction, observer-uncertainty, and runtime-refinement traces before mechanized-custody language.

model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.strongest_counterclaim: The theorem merely labels a complete Boolean request and neither distributes an artifact nor establishes extraction, benefit, authority, or responsible release.
model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-.falsifier: The model converts the record into distribution authority, implies recall, or cannot preserve the non-execution boundary in an executable release workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Bind the record to a separately authorized public-safe release simulation with recipient/copy effects and no authority or support laundering.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: eight manifest targets prove only the explicit finite routing consequences.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Restates the exact finite proof boundary.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The sentence was rewritten to remove formulaic prose while preserving its bounded meaning; the old sentence hash is no longer current prose.

non_claims: This semantic sweep does not promote the chapter, prove novelty, establish conformance, or authorize custody, loading, deployment, or release.
No source mapping, asset list, key, signature, token, attestation result, schema, fixture, theorem, blocked route, or sanitization receipt is counted beyond its exact frozen scope.

Negative, null, false-denial, outage, extraction, recovery, privacy/rights, cost, dependency, discovery-gap, and irreversible-release outcomes remain visible and cannot be relabeled as successful custody.
